title: [IOS]App Settings - General - Account - Log in - Log out - Continue
scenario: Verify user can log in and log out via App Settings, with correct UI states before and after login/logout.
steps: Tap 'Continue' and log in with credentials
Verify 'Your account' text, Name and Email fields are populated
Verify a login dialog appears with Cancel and Continue options
Verify 'Your account' text shows 'You aren't currently logged in'
Verify Log in button is visible
expected: User can successfully log in and log out via the App Settings menu. After login, 'Your account' text, Name and Email fields are populated. After logout, a confirmation dialog appears, user is logged out, 'Your account' text shows 'You aren't currently logged in', and the Log in button is visible.
